title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXXXIV. Games.
content:
[A game on the slate.]

        Eggs, butter, bread,
        Stick, stock, stone dead!
        Stick him up, stick him down,
        Stick him in the old man's crown!
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXXXIV. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
